scripts.ui:snapshot: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path='e2e/node_modules';if(fs.existsSync(path)){fs.rmSync(path,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('removed e2e/node_modules');}" && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --project=chromium --reporter=list --grep "UI Snapshot"
scripts.ui:link-crawl: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path='e2e/node_modules';if(fs.existsSync(path)){fs.rmSync(path,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('removed e2e/node_modules');}" && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --project=chromium --reporter=list --grep "UI Link Crawler"
